title: Quiet Night Thought
description: The most memorized poem in the Chinese language: moonlight on the floor, homesickness for home.
introduction: The most memorized poem in the Chinese language: moonlight on the floor, homesickness for home.

translation.text: Before my bed, bright moonlight — could it be frost on the ground? I lift my head to gaze at the bright moon, then lower it, thinking of home.
